system.description: Colored energy surrounds the caster, shielding them against creatures of one chosen alignment aspect either chaos (blue), evil (white), good (black), or law (red). The caster gains a +4 bonus to armor class against attacks by creatures of the selected aspect, and with a touch the caster can automatically dispel any one spell cast by them (except those spells that cannot be dispelled by dispel magic). Additionally, the caster may force a summoned, enchanted or extraplanar creature back to its proper plane with a successful touch attack. The creature gets no saving throw, but use of this effect immediately ends the spell.
